_p0_9_note: P0-9 / ultracode-audit-2026-06-06: zipSha256 is a placeholder. The release CI workflow overwrites this field with the real SHA256 of the .zip at upload time (see .github/workflows/build.yaml::release). The placeholder is intentionally invalid (all-zeros) so that the WebUI update checker refuses to download a release until the CI stamps the real hash. The release will not be published until this field is non-zero — this is enforced by the update-check.js in the WebUI (toast update_unsigned_warning).
